24.reason: The return value of insert is not assigned to root, so the tree remains empty. Should be: root = insert(root, data);

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The return value of insert is not assigned to root, so the tree is never actually built beyond the first node. This causes root to remain NULL throughout.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The return value of insert is not assigned to root, so the tree is not updated when inserting into an empty tree or subtrees. This causes the root to remain NULL throughout, leading to undefined behavior in printleaf.]
